tasks.name: Project Bootstrap
tasks.description: Set up Phaser 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Vitest project structure with proper tooling and configurations. Reference: D-001 (Phaser 3), D-002 (TypeScript), D-003 (Vite), D-004 (Vitest)

tasks.name: Scene Framework
tasks.description: Create scene system with BootScene, MenuScene, PlayScene, and GameOverScene. Implement scene transitions and state management. Reference: Architecture.md section 5 (Scene State Model)

tasks.name: Pálya JSON Loader
tasks.description: Implement level loader that reads JSON pálya files. Parse grid-based obstacles, spawn points, goal zones, and loot positions. Reference: Tech.md section 4.2, JatekLeiras.md section 5

tasks.name: Grid System
tasks.description: Implement 7×6 grid with trapezoid perspective rendering. Create grid utilities for coordinate conversions (logical to screen space). Reference: Vizualitas.md section 4, Architecture.md section 6.1

tasks.name: Player Movement & Collision
tasks.description: Implement player character with keyboard input controls and collision detection against obstacles. Use custom collision provider interface. Reference: D-014 (Collision Architecture), JatekLeiras.md section 6.1

tasks.name: Enemy Spawning & A* Pathfinding
tasks.description: Implement enemy spawning system with wave mechanics. Create A* pathfinding algorithm for grid-based enemy movement with static paths calculated at spawn. Reference: D-013 (Custom A* Pathfinding), JatekLeiras.md section 5.1, Architecture.md section 6.4

tasks.name: Attack System
tasks.description: Implement player attack (spell/sword strike) with area-of-effect collision detection. Handle enemy knockback and attack cooldown mechanics. Reference: JatekLeiras.md section 6.2-6.3

tasks.name: Loot System
tasks.description: Implement loot spawning, pickup mechanics, inventory storage (max 4 items), and deposit at sanctuary zones. Handle loot visual feedback (blinking when near player). Reference: JatekLeiras.md section 5.2, Vizualitas.md section 4.2

tasks.name: Audio Integration
tasks.description: Integrate audio system with IAudioService interface wrapper around Phaser audio. Implement background music, sound effects for attacks, pickups, and events. Reference: D-016 (Audio Architecture), Tech.md section 7.2, Architecture.md section 8

tasks.name: UI/HUD Implementation
tasks.description: Create in-game HUD showing score (Pont), inventory display (0-4), escaped enemies count (Reptérre érkeztek), and current level/wave. Reference: JatekLeiras.md section 12 (HUD Specs), Vizualitas.md section 8

tasks.name: Leaderboard & LocalStorage
tasks.description: Implement score persistence via LocalStorage. Create leaderboard display for top scores. Reference: D-017 (No Telemetry), JatekLeiras.md section 13

tasks.name: Testing & Polish
tasks.description: Write unit tests for game systems (collision, pathfinding, scoring). Performance optimization, balance tuning, visual polish, and gameplay refinement. Reference: D-004 (Vitest), Architecture.md section 11

tasks.name: Deployment & Docs
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Pages deployment. Build static assets pipeline. Create developer documentation for onboarding. Reference: D-018 (GitHub Pages), Tech.md section 9
